headline: Air Products and Chemicals: Hormuz Strait And CapEx Discipline In Focus (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Air Products and Chemicals manages helium supply risks and CapEx discipline, but valuation upside narrows. Read why APD stock is downgraded to hold.
